			.sub-value.amber  { color: var(--amber); }
			.sub-value.red    { color: var(--red);   }
			.sub-value.blue   { color: var(--blue);  }
			.progress-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
			.progress-labels {
				display: flex;
				justify-content: space-between;
				font-size: 10px;
				color: var(--text-3);
			}
			.buckets { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
			.bucket  { flex: 1; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04); border-radius: 8px; padding: 6px 4px; text-align: center; }
			.bucket-val   { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; }
			.bucket-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }
			.bucket.b1 .bucket-val { color: var(--amber); }
			.bucket.b2 .bucket-val { color: var(--red);   }
			.bucket.b3 .bucket-val { color: #b02020;      }
			.wow.green   { color: var(--green); }
			.wow.red     { color: var(--red); }
			.wow.neutral { color: var(--text-3); }

			/* Coverage card extras */
			.section-label { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: .06em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-3); }
			.seg-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; font-size: 12px; }
			.seg-name { color: var(--text-2); font-weight: 600; }
			.seg-vals { display: flex; gap: 6px; align-items: center; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); }
			.seg-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); font-weight: 500; }
			.seg-bar { margin-top: 3px; height: 5px; }
			.delta-badge { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; }
			.delta-badge.green { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
			.delta-badge.red   { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red);   }
			.delta-badge.neutral { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); color: var(--text-3); }
			.wow-row { display: flex; gap: 5px; }
			.wow-row .wow-item { flex: 1; }
			.wow-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 5px; }
			.wow-item { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.03); border-radius: 8px; padding: 5px 7px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; }
			.wow-item.green { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
			.wow-item.red   { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red);   }
			.wow-item.neutral { color: var(--text-2); }
			.wow-item strong { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 900; }
			.wow-item span   { font-size: 10px; opacity: .8; font-weight: 500; }

			.modal-section-title {
				font-size: 10px;
				font-weight: 700;
				letter-spacing: .06em;
				text-transform: uppercase;
				color: var(--text-3);
				margin-bottom: 6px;
			}

			.modal-act-grid {
				display: grid;
				grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
				gap: 6px;
			}
			.modal-act-cell {
				background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
				border-radius: 8px;
				padding: 6px 4px;
				text-align: center;
			}
			.modal-act-val   { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-2); }
			.modal-act-label { font-size: 9px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em; }

			.modal-diagnosis {
				display: flex;
				align-items: center;
				gap: 8px;
				font-size: 12px;
				font-weight: 700;
				padding: 8px 12px;
				border-radius: 8px;
				background: rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
				color: var(--text-3);
			}
			.modal-diagnosis.sev-3 { background: var(--red-bg);   color: var(--red); }
			.modal-diagnosis.sev-2 { background: var(--amber-bg); color: var(--amber); }
			.modal-diagnosis.sev-1 { background: rgba(201,120,0,0.06); color: var(--text-2); }
			.modal-diagnosis::before { content: ''; width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: currentColor; flex-shrink: 0; }

			/* Mini funnel (matches KPI_Hero_Cards) */
			.funnel-rows       { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:2px; margin-top:4px; }
			.funnel-row        { display:grid; grid-template-columns:70px 32px 1fr; align-items:center; gap:4px; }
			.funnel-label      { font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; white-space:nowrap; }
			.funnel-value      { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; text-align:right; }
			.funnel-bar-track  { height:4px; background:#f3f4f6; border-radius:2px; overflow:hidden; }
			.funnel-bar        { height:4px; border-radius:2px; }
			.funnel-bar.blue   { background:#3b82f6; }
			.funnel-cr         { font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; padding-left:74px; }

			/* ── Activity Funnel (Duolingo Style) ── */
			.act-step            { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
			.act-step-header     { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
			.act-step-icon       { font-size: 13px; line-height: 1; flex-shrink: 0; }
			.act-step-label      { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-2); flex: 1; }
			.act-step-value      { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 900; color: var(--text-1); }
			.act-bar-track       { height: 8px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; }
			.act-bar             { height: 8px; border-radius: 4px; }
			.act-bar--blue       { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); }
			.act-bar--green      { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399); }
			.act-bar--purple     { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #8b5cf6, #a78bfa); }
			.act-bar--amber  { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f59e0b, #fbbf24); }
			.act-bar--red    { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #ef4444, #f87171); }
			.act-bar--teal   { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #14b8a6, #5eead4); }
			.act-bar--neutral { background: rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }
			@keyframes barGrow { from { width: 0; } }
			.act-bar { animation: barGrow 0.6s ease-out; }
			.act-breakdown       { display: flex; gap: 5px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
			.act-chip            { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); background: rgba(0,0,0,0.05); padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 10px; }
			.act-conv            { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; }
			.act-conv-line       { flex: 1; height: 1px; background: var(--border); }
			.act-conv-pct        { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-3); white-space: nowrap; }

			/* ── Pipeline Gesundheit sections (modal) ── */
			.ph-section       { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; }
			.ph-section-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-2); display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 5px; }
			.ph-def           { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 400; color: var(--text-3); }
			.ph-row           { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; }
			.ph-label         { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); }
			.ph-value         { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-1); }
			.ph-value.red     { color: var(--red); }
			.ph-value.amber   { color: var(--amber); }
			.ph-value.green   { color: var(--green); }

			/* ── Group Headers ── */
			.group-header-row th  { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;
				letter-spacing: 0.5px; padding: 4px 6px; color: var(--text-3); }
			.gh                   { text-align: center; border-bottom: 3px solid transparent; }
			.gh-blue              { border-bottom-color: #3b82f6; color: #3b82f6; }
			.gh-green             { border-bottom-color: #10b981; color: #10b981; }
			.gh-amber             { border-bottom-color: #f59e0b; color: #f59e0b; }
			.gh-gray              { border-bottom-color: #6b7280; color: #6b7280; }
			.gh-purple            { border-bottom-color: #8b5cf6; color: #8b5cf6; }

			/* ── Mini Bars ── */
			.mini-bar-track       { height: 3px; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); border-radius: 2px;
				margin-top: 2px; overflow: hidden; }
			.mini-bar             { height: 3px; border-radius: 2px; }
			.mini-bar--blue       { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #3b82f6, #60a5fa); }
			.mini-bar--green      { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #10b981, #34d399); }

			/* ── Trend Arrows ── */
			.trend                { font-size: 10px; margin-left: 2px; }
			.trend.green          { color: var(--green); }
			.trend.red            { color: var(--red); }
			.trend.neutral        { color: var(--text-3); }

			/* ── Cell Layout ── */
			.cell-val             { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 2px; }
			.sub-col              { color: var(--text-3); font-size: 11px; text-align: right; }
			.td-name              { text-align: left !important; white-space: nowrap; }
			.th-left              { text-align: left !important; }

			/* ── Star Performer ── */
			.medal                { font-size: 13px; }
			.team-tag              { display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; padding: 1px 4px; border-radius: 4px; margin-left: 2px; vertical-align: middle; }
			.team-tag--wolves      { background: rgba(99,102,241,0.12); }
			.team-tag--titans      { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.12); }
			.team-tag--locos       { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.12); }


			/* ── Composite Badge ── */
			.comp-badge           { display: inline-block; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 12px;
				font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; }
			.comp-badge.cmt-green  { background: #e8f5e9; color: #2e7d32; border: 1px solid #a5d6a7; }
			.comp-badge.cmt-amber  { background: #fff3e0; color: #e65100; border: 1px solid #ffcc80; }
			.comp-badge.cmt-red    { background: #ffebee; color: #c62828; border: 1px solid #ef9a9a; }
			.comp-badge.green, .comp-badge.fc-green  { background: rgba(16,185,129,0.15); color: #059669; }
			.comp-badge.amber, .comp-badge.fc-amber  { background: rgba(245,158,11,0.15);  color: #d97706; }
			.comp-badge.red,   .comp-badge.fc-red    { background: rgba(239,68,68,0.15);   color: #dc2626; }

			/* ── Level Tag ── */
			.level-tag            { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: 8px;
				background: rgba(0,0,0,0.06); color: var(--text-3); margin-left: 4px; }

			/* ── Benchmark Coloring ── */
			.num-green            { color: #059669 !important; font-weight: 700; }
			.num-amber            { color: #d97706 !important; font-weight: 700; }
			.num-red              { color: #dc2626 !important; font-weight: 700; }

			/* ── Col header row ── */
			.col-header-row th    { font-size: 10px; padding: 5px 6px; }

			/* ── Duolingo Animations ── */
			@keyframes fadeInUp {
				from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); }
				to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
			}
			@keyframes slideIn {
				from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-12px) scale(0.97); }
				to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
			}
			@keyframes pulse {
				0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
				50%       { transform: scale(1.35); opacity: 0.7; }
			}
			@keyframes miniBarGrow {
				from { width: 0 !important; }
			}
			@keyframes badgePop {
				0%   { transform: scale(0.7); opacity: 0; }
				80%  { transform: scale(1.1); }
				100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
			}
			@keyframes sparkDraw {
				from { stroke-dashoffset: 1000; }
				to   { stroke-dashoffset: 0; }
			}

			/* ── Row Stagger ── */
			.row-anim { animation: fadeInUp 0.3s ease both; }

			/* ── Hover Transform ── */
			tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(0,120,212,0.04) !important; transform: translateX(1px); transition: background .12s, transform .12s; }

			/* ── Mini-bar grow ── */
			.mini-bar { animation: miniBarGrow 0.6s ease both; }

			/* ── Badge pop ── */
			.comp-badge { animation: badgePop 0.4s ease both; }

			/* ── Cell Drilldown ── */
			.cell-drilldown {
				cursor: pointer;
				text-decoration: underline dotted;
				text-underline-offset: 2px;
			}
			.cell-drilldown:hover { color: var(--blue) !important; }

			/* ── Spark Popup ── */
			#spark-popup {
				display: none;
				position: fixed;
				z-index: 2000;
				background: rgba(255,255,255,0.97);
				backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
				-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
				border: 1px solid var(--border);
				border-radius: 12px;
				box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.16);
				padding: 14px 16px;
				min-width: 320px;
				max-width: 360px;
				animation: slideIn 0.2s ease;
			}
			#spark-popup.open { display: block; }
			.spark-header {
				display: flex;
				justify-content: space-between;
				align-items: center;
				margin-bottom: 10px;
			}
			.spark-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
			.spark-close {
				background: none; border: none; font-size: 16px;
				cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-3); line-height: 1; padding: 2px 4px;
			}
			.spark-close:hover { color: var(--text-1); }
			.spark-chart { line-height: 0; }

			/* ── Coaching Card ── */
			.coaching-card {
				background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(0,120,212,0.06), rgba(88,204,2,0.06));
				border: 1px solid rgba(0,120,212,0.12);
				border-radius: 12px;
				padding: 14px 16px;
				margin-top: 4px;
			}
			.coaching-card-title {
				font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase;
				letter-spacing: .06em; color: var(--text-3); margin-bottom: 10px;
			}
			.coaching-tip {
				display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 10px;
				background: rgba(255,255,255,0.75); border-radius: 8px;
				margin-bottom: 6px; align-items: flex-start;
			}
			.coaching-tip:last-child { margin-bottom: 0; }
			.coaching-tip-emoji { font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.3; flex-shrink: 0; }
			.coaching-tip-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--text-1); }
			.coaching-tip-detail { font-size: 11px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }

			/* ── Sub-note ── */
			.sub-note { font-size: 10px; color: var(--text-3); margin-top: 2px; }


			/* ── Loading Overlay ── */
			#loadingOverlay {
				position: fixed;
				inset: 0;
				display: flex;
				align-items: center;
				justify-content: center;
				flex-direction: column;
				gap: 14px;
				background: rgba(255,255,255,0.65);
				backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
				-webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
				z-index: 9999;
				opacity: 1;
				transition: opacity 0.45s ease;
				pointer-events: none;
			}
			#loadingOverlay.hidden {
				opacity: 0;
			}
			.loader-spinner {
				width: 38px;
				height: 38px;
				border: 3px solid #e5e7eb;
				border-top-color: #4f46e5;
				border-radius: 50%;
				animation: loaderSpin 0.7s linear infinite;
			}
			@keyframes loaderSpin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }
			.loader-text {
				font-size: 12px;
				color: #6b7280;
				letter-spacing: 0.02em;
			}

		</style>
	</head>
	<body>

		<div class="container" id="container">
			<div id="loadingOverlay">
				<div class="loader-spinner"></div>
				<span class="loader-text">Daten werden geladen…</span>
			</div>


			<div class="toolbar" id="toolbar">
				<div class="toolbar-filters" id="filter-btns">
					<button class="filter-btn active" onclick="setFilter('all')">Alle</button>
					<button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('wolves')">Wolves</button>
					<button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('titans')">Titans</button>
					<button class="filter-btn" onclick="setFilter('locos')">Locos</button>
				</div>
				<select id="quarter-select" style="margin-left:12px;padding:5px 10px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.15);font-size:12px;font-weight:700;background:#fff;color:#1a1a2e;cursor:pointer" onchange="setQuarter(this.value)">
				</select>
				<button class="refresh-btn" onclick="doRefresh()">↻ Aktualisieren</button>
			</div>
			<div id="table-wrap">
				<div class="empty">Lade Daten…</div>
			</div>
		</div>

		<div class="modal-overlay" id="modal-overlay" onclick="closeModal(event)">
			<div class="modal" id="modal-content" onclick="event.stopPropagation()"></div>
		</div>
		<div id="rep-chart-overlay" onclick="closeRepChartModal()" style="display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1100;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding-top:16px">
			<div id="rep-chart-content" onclick="event.stopPropagation()" style="background:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:14px 16px 16px;width:min(96%,500px);max-height:calc(100% - 32px);overflow-y:auto;position:relative;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.22)">
			</div>
		</div>
		<div id="spark-popup">
			<div class="spark-header">
				<span class="spark-title"></span>
				<button class="spark-close" onclick="closeSparkPopup()">✕</button>
			</div>
			<div class="spark-chart"></div>
		</div>

		<script>
			var _allReps    = [];
			var _medals     = {};
			var _weeklyData = {};
			var _wk         = {};
			var _staleList  = [];
			var _teamFilter = 'all';
			var _sortCol    = 'composite';
			var _sortDir    = 'desc';
			var _weeksElapsed = 1;

			function fmt(n) {
				if (!n) return '—';
				const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
				if (abs >= 1000000) return (abs/1000000).toFixed(1).replace('.',',') + ' Mio.';
				if (abs >= 1000)    return Math.round(abs/1000) + 'k';
				return abs.toString();
			}
			function fmtFull(n) {
				if (!n || n === 0) return '€ 0';
				const abs = Math.round(Math.abs(n));
				return '€ ' + abs.toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.');
			}
			function fmtN(n) { return (n || 0).toString().replace(/\B(?=(\d{3})+(?!\d))/g, '.'); }
			function statusLabel(s) {
				return { green: 'Gesund', amber: 'Warnung', red: 'Kritisch' }[s] || '—';
			}
			function col(s) {
				return { green: 'var(--green)', amber: 'var(--amber)', red: 'var(--red)' }[s] || 'var(--text-2)';
			}
			function pct(n) { return (n || 0) + '\u202f%'; }
			function fmtD(n) { return ((n || 0).toFixed(1)).replace('.', ','); }
			function clamp(v, mn, mx) { return Math.max(mn, Math.min(mx, v)); }

			function teamClass(team) {
				return { ferdinand: 'team-ferdinand', jan: 'team-jan', philipp: 'team-philipp' }[team] || '';
			}
			function teamEmoji(team) {
				return { wolves: '🐺', titans: '⚡', locos: '😈' }[team] || '';
			}
			function teamLabel(team) {
				return { wolves: 'Wolves', titans: 'Titans', locos: 'Locos' }[team] || (team || '—');
			}
			function levelLabel(level) {
				return { '3': 'L3', '2': 'L2', '1': 'L1', 'rampup': 'Ramp' }[level] || 'L2';
			}
			function statusColor(v, thresholds, inverted) {
				if (inverted) {
					if (v <= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
					if (v <= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
					return 'num-red';
				}
				if (v >= thresholds[0]) return 'num-green';
				if (v >= thresholds[1]) return 'num-amber';
				return 'num-red';
			}

			function setFilter(team) {
				_teamFilter = team;
				document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn').forEach(function(b) {
					b.classList.toggle('active', b.getAttribute('onclick').indexOf("'" + team + "'") !== -1);
				});
				renderTable();
				var evtMap = { all: 'onFilterAll', wolves: 'onFilterWolves', titans: 'onFilterTitans', locos: 'onFilterLocos' };
				if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && evtMap[team]) {
					appsmith.triggerEvent(evtMap[team]);
				}
			}

			// ── Quartals-Filter ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
			var _currentQuarter = null;

			function setQuarter(val) {
				_currentQuarter = val;
				appsmith.updateModel({ pendingQuarter: val });
				setTimeout(function() { appsmith.triggerEvent('onQuarterChange'); }, 100);
			}

			function populateQuarterDropdown(model) {
				var sel = document.getElementById('quarter-select');
				if (!sel) return;
				var opts = (model && model.quarterOptions) ? model.quarterOptions : [];
				var curr = (model && model.selectedQuarter) ? model.selectedQuarter : '';
				sel.innerHTML = '';
				if (!opts.length) {
					var opt = document.createElement('option');
					opt.value = '';
					opt.textContent = 'Laufendes Quartal';
					sel.appendChild(opt);
					return;
				}
				opts.forEach(function(o) {
					var opt = document.createElement('option');
					opt.value = o.value;
					opt.textContent = o.label;
					if (o.value === curr) opt.selected = true;
					sel.appendChild(opt);
				});
			}


			function doRefresh() {
				if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
					appsmith.triggerEvent('onRefresh');
				}
			}

			function sortBy(col) {
				if (_sortCol === col) {
					_sortDir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
				} else {
					_sortCol = col;
					_sortDir = 'desc';
				}
				renderTable();
			}

			function filteredSortedReps() {
				var reps = _teamFilter === 'all'
				? _allReps.slice()
				: _allReps.filter(function(r) { return r.team === _teamFilter; });

				var col = _sortCol;
				var dir = _sortDir === 'desc' ? -1 : 1;

				reps.sort(function(a, b) {
					var av = 0, bv = 0;
					if      (col === 'name')     { return dir * (a.repName||'').localeCompare(b.repName||''); }
					else if (col === 'touch')    { av = a.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchPerDay     || 0; }
					else if (col === 'calls')    { av = a.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; bv = b.l30DialsPerDay     || 0; }
					else if (col === 'mails')    { av = a.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; bv = b.l30EmailsPerDay    || 0; }
					else if (col === 'qt')       { av = a.l30QualPerDay      || 0; bv = b.l30QualPerDay      || 0; }
					else if (col === 'qc')       { av = a.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; bv = b.l30QualCallsPerDay || 0; }
					else if (col === 'mtg')      { av = a.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; bv = b.l30MeetingsPerDay  || 0; }
					else if (col === 'accts')     { av = a.l90UniqueAccounts  || 0; bv = b.l90UniqueAccounts  || 0; }
					else if (col === 'tToQt')    { av = a.l30TouchToQual     || 0; bv = b.l30TouchToQual     || 0; }
					else if (col === 'qtToO')    { av = a.l30QualToOpp       || 0; bv = b.l30QualToOpp       || 0; }
					else if (col === 'oppPerDay') { av = a.l30OppPerDay       || 0; bv = b.l30OppPerDay       || 0; }
					else if (col === 'cov')      { av = a.coverageVal        || 0; bv = b.coverageVal        || 0; }
					else if (col === 'stale')    { av = 100-(a.staleRateVal||0); bv = 100-(b.staleRateVal||0); }
					else if (col === 'ovd')      { av = a.overdueCount       || 0; bv = b.overdueCount       || 0; }
					else if (col === 'pilots')   { av = a.pilotenCount       || 0; bv = b.pilotenCount       || 0; }
					else if (col === 'bookings') { av = a.bookingsARR        || 0; bv = b.bookingsARR        || 0; }
					else if (col === 'wr')       { av = a.winRateVal         || 0; bv = b.winRateVal         || 0; }
					else if (col === 'composite'){ av = a.composite          || 0; bv = b.composite          || 0; }
					else if (col === 'fc')       { av = a.forecastAtt        || 0; bv = b.forecastAtt        || 0; }
					else if (col === 'cmt')      { av = a.commitAtt          || 0; bv = b.commitAtt          || 0; }
					else if (col === 'dev')      { av = a.commitDeviation    || 0; bv = b.commitDeviation    || 0; }
					return (av - bv) * dir;
				});
				return reps;
			}

			function arrowHtml(col) {

			function pctOf(val, max) { return max > 0 ? Math.round((val || 0) / max * 100) : 0; }
			function fcStatus(v)      { return (v||0) >= 80 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
			function deviationCls(v)   { return (v||0) >= 0 ? 'green' : (v||0) >= -10 ? 'amber' : 'red'; }
			function pilotStatus(r) {
				if (!r.pilotenTarget) return '';

				function th2(col, label, align, tip) {

			function openModal(repId) {
				var r = _allReps.find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; });
				if (!r) return;
				var status    = r.overallStatus || 'neutral';
				var composite = r.composite != null ? r.composite : 0;
				var bAtt      = r.bookingsAtt || 0;
				var pAtt      = r.pilotenAtt  || 0;
				var pW        = r.pilotenWeight != null ? r.pilotenWeight : 0;
				var diag      = r.rootCause || { cause: '—', severity: 0 };
				var diagCls   = diag.severity >= 3 ? 'sev-3' : diag.severity >= 2 ? 'sev-2' : diag.severity >= 1 ? 'sev-1' : '';
				var bFill     = clamp(bAtt, 0, 100);
				var bClr      = bAtt >= 80 ? 'green' : bAtt >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red';
				var pFill     = clamp(pAtt, 0, 100);
				var pClr      = pAtt >= 80 ? 'green' : pAtt >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red';

				// Attainment forecast
				var compFore    = r.compositeForecast   || 0;
				var badgeCls    = compFore >= 100 ? 'green' : compFore >= 80 ? 'amber' : 'red';
				var compUplift  = (r.bookingsTarget || 0) > 0 ? Math.round((r.wonCWArr || 0) / r.bookingsTarget * 100 * (r.bookingsWeight || 0.75)) : 0;
				var compUpliftCls  = compUplift > 0 ? 'green' : (compUplift < 0 ? 'red' : 'neutral');
				var compUpliftSign = compUplift > 0 ? '+' : '';
				var bForeAtt    = r.forecastAtt         || 0;
				var pilotenCnt  = r.pilotenCount        || 0;
				var pilotenTgt  = r.pilotenTarget       || 0;
				var pilotenForeN = r.pilotenForecast    || 0;
				var pilotenForeA = r.pilotenForecastAtt || 0;

				// Bookings card
				var bkAtt     = r.bookingsAtt || 0;
				var bkStatus  = bkAtt >= 80 ? 'green' : bkAtt >= 60 ? 'amber' : 'red';
				var forecast  = r.forecast || 0;

				// Coverage card
				var covNum    = r.coverageVal || 0;
				var covVal    = covNum.toFixed(1).replace('.',',');
				var covStatus = r.coverageStatus || 'neutral';
				var forecastPct = r.bookingsTarget > 0 ? Math.round((forecast / r.bookingsTarget) * 100) : 0;
				var selfSvcPct  = r.bookingsTarget > 0 ? Math.round(((r.selfSvcARR || 0) / r.bookingsTarget) * 100) : 0;
				var covTotalPipe  = r.pipelineARR || 0;
				var covPilotArr   = r.pilotPipeArr || 0;
				var covPilotOpps  = r.pilotPipeOpps || 0;
				var covBestArr    = r.bestandArr || 0;

			function fmtFull2(v) {

				var MW=460,MH=140,mPX=26,mPT=10,mPB=16;
				var mInner=MH-mPT-mPB,mBottom=mPT+mInner,mTxEnd=MW-mPX;

				var mMaxPl=Math.max(pTgt*1.05,bookData[bookData.length-1].cumPilots||1);
				var msyBk=function(v){return mPT+mInner*(1-v/mMaxBk);};
				var msyPl=function(v){return mPT+mInner*(1-v/mMaxPl);};
				var msx=function(i){return mPX+i*mStep;};
				var mbkPts=bookData.map(function(d){return msx(wkN(d.week)-sw)+','+msyBk(d.cumArr);}).join(' ');
				var mplPts=bookData.map(function(d){return msx(wkN(d.week)-sw)+','+msyPl(d.cumPilots||0);}).join(' ');

				var rows=bookData.map(function(d,i){
					var pb=i>0?bookData[i-1].cumArr:0;
					var pp=i>0?(bookData[i-1].cumPilots||0):0;
					var dA=d.cumArr-pb,dP=(d.cumPilots||0)-pp,isl=i===bookData.length-1;
					var dAFmt=dA>=1000000?(dA/1000000).toFixed(2)+'M':dA>=1000?(dA/1000).toFixed(0)+'k':Math.round(dA)+'';
					return '<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid rgba(0,0,0,.05)'+(isl?';font-weight:700':'')+'">'+'<td style="padding:3px 6px">'+d.week+'</td>'+'<td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 6px">'+fmtFull2(d.cumArr)+'</td>'+'<td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 6px;color:rgba(0,0,0,.4)">+'+dAFmt+'</td>'+'<td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 6px">'+(d.cumPilots||0)+'</td>'+'<td style="text-align:right;padding:3px 6px;color:rgba(0,0,0,.4)">+'+Math.max(0,Math.round(dP))+'</td>'+'</tr>';
				}).join('');
				var mcirc=bookData.map(function(d){
					var tip=d.week+': '+fmtFull2(d.cumArr)+' · '+Math.round(d.cumArr/bTgt*100)+'% vom Ziel';
					return '<circle cx="'+msx(wkN(d.week)-sw)+'" cy="'+msyBk(d.cumArr)+'" r="6" fill="'+clrBk+'" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" class="mcir" data-tip="'+tip+'" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="showMcTip2(event)"/>';
				}).join('');
				var mcirc2=bookData.map(function(d){
					var tip=d.week+': '+(d.cumPilots||0)+' Piloten · '+Math.round((d.cumPilots||0)/pTgt*100)+'% vom Ziel';
					return '<circle cx="'+msx(wkN(d.week)-sw)+'" cy="'+msyPl(d.cumPilots||0)+'" r="5" fill="'+clrPl+'" stroke="white" stroke-width="2" class="mcir" data-tip="'+tip+'" style="cursor:pointer" onclick="showMcTip2(event)"/>';
				}).join('');
				var h='<button onclick="event.stopPropagation();closeRepChartModal()" style="position:absolute;top:8px;right:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.07);border:none;font-size:16px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;color:#666;border-radius:50%;width:24px;height:24px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center">×</button>'
				+'<div style="background:'+clrBk+'18;border-radius:8px;padding:8px 12px;margin-bottom:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">'
				+'<span style="font-size:14px;font-weight:900;color:#1a1a2e;flex:1">'+r.repName+'</span>'
				+'<span style="background:'+clrBk+';color:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:1px 9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700">BK '+Math.round(bAtt)+'%</span>'
				+'<span style="background:'+clrPl+';color:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:1px 9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700">PIL '+Math.round(pAtt)+'%</span>'
				+'</div>'
				+'<div id="rep-mchart-tip" style="display:none;position:fixed;background:rgba(20,20,20,.88);color:#fff;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;padding:6px 11px;border-radius:8px;white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;z-index:10002;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.3)"></div>'
				+'<svg width="100%" viewBox="0 0 '+MW+' '+MH+'" style="display:block;overflow:visible">'
				+'<path d="'+mArea+'" fill="'+clrBk+'" fill-opacity=".12"/>'
				+'<polyline points="'+mbkPts+'" fill="none" stroke="'+clrBk+'" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>'
				+'<line x1="'+mPX+'" y1="'+msyBk(0)+'" x2="'+mTxEnd+'" y2="'+msyBk(bTgt)+'" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.15)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/>'
				+'<polyline points="'+mplPts+'" fill="none" stroke="'+clrPl+'" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="4 2"/>'
				+'<line x1="'+mPX+'" y1="'+msyPl(0)+'" x2="'+mTxEnd+'" y2="'+msyPl(pTgt)+'" stroke="rgba(0,0,0,.1)" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3 2"/>'
				+mcirc+mcirc2
				+'<text x="'+mPX+'" y="'+(MH-3)+'" font-size="10" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.3)">'+bookData[0].week+'</text>'
				+'<text x="'+mTxEnd+'" y="'+(MH-3)+'" font-size="10" fill="rgba(0,0,0,.3)" text-anchor="end">'+bookData[bookData.length-1].week+'</text>'
				+'</svg>'
				+'<div style="max-height:140px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:8px">'
				+'<table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:10px">'
				+'<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid rgba(0,0,0,.1)">'
				+'<th style="text-align:left;padding:4px 6px;color:#999;font-weight:600">KW</th>'
				+'<th style="text-align:right;padding:4px 6px;color:#999;font-weight:600">BK kum.</th>'
				+'<th style="text-align:right;padding:4px 6px;color:#999;font-weight:600">Δ BK</th>'
				+'<th style="text-align:right;padding:4px 6px;color:#999;font-weight:600">PIL kum.</th>'
				+'<th style="text-align:right;padding:4px 6px;color:#999;font-weight:600">Δ PIL</th>'
				+'</tr>'
				+rows
				+'</table></div>';
				document.getElementById('rep-chart-content').innerHTML = h;
				document.getElementById('rep-chart-overlay').style.display = 'flex';
			}
			function closeRepChartModal() {
				document.getElementById('rep-chart-overlay').style.display = 'none';

			function showMcTip2(e) {
				e.stopPropagation();
				var tip=document.getElementById('rep-mchart-tip');
				if(!tip)return;
				var text=e.target.getAttribute('data-tip');
				if(tip.style.display==='block'&&tip._src===e.target){tip.style.display='none';tip._src=null;return;}
				tip.textContent=text;tip.style.display='block';tip._src=e.target;
				tip.style.left=e.clientX+'px';tip.style.top=(e.clientY-44)+'px';tip.style.transform='translateX(-50%)';
				requestAnimationFrame(function(){
					var tw=tip.offsetWidth,vw=window.innerWidth,cx=e.clientX-tw/2;
					if(cx<4)cx=4;if(cx+tw>vw-4)cx=vw-tw-4;
					tip.style.left=cx+'px';tip.style.transform='none';
				});
			}

			function closeModal(e) {
				if (!e || e.target === document.getElementById('modal-overlay')) {
					document.getElementById('modal-overlay').classList.remove('open');
				}
			}


			function coachingTips(r) {
				var tips = [];
				var qp     = (_wk && _wk.total > 0) ? (_wk.done / _wk.total) : 0.5;
				var isEndQ = qp > 0.85;

				// Dynamic team benchmarks
				var bm = (function() {
					var reps = (_allReps || []).filter(function(x){ return (x.l30TouchPerDay||0) > 0; });
					function med(arr) {
						var s = arr.filter(function(v){ return v > 0; }).sort(function(a,b){ return a-b; });
						return s.length ? s[Math.floor(s.length/2)] : 0;
					}
					return {
						touch: med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.l30TouchPerDay||0; })),
						tToQT: med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.l30TouchToQual||0; })),
						qtToO: med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.l30QualToOpp||0; })),
						mtg:   med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.l30MeetingsPerDay||0; })),
						wr:    med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.winRateVal||0; })),
						d2po:  med(reps.map(function(x){ return Math.min(x.demoToPilotOpp||0, 100); })),
						p2pil: med(reps.map(function(x){ return x.pilotToOpp||0; })),
					};
				})();

				// Shortcuts
				var touch   = r.l30TouchPerDay    || 0;
				var tToQT   = r.l30TouchToQual    || 0;
				var qtToOpp = r.l30QualToOpp      || 0;
				var mtg     = r.l30MeetingsPerDay || 0;
				var wr      = r.winRateVal        || 0;
				var bkARR   = r.bookingsARR       || 0;
				var bkTgt   = r.bookingsTarget    || 0;
				var bkAtt   = bkTgt > 0 ? (bkARR / bkTgt * 100) : 0;
				var pipe    = r.pipelineARR       || 0;
				var stale   = r.staleCount        || 0;
				var totalOp = r.totalOpenCount    || 0;
				var pilCnt  = r.pilotenCount      || 0;
				var pilTgt  = r.pilotenTarget     || 0;
				var pilWt   = r.pilotenWeight     || 0;
				var pilPipe = r.pilotPipeOpps     || 0;
				var d2po    = r.demoToPilotOpp    || 0;
				var p2pil   = r.pilotToOpp        || 0;
				var demos   = r.demos             || 0;
				var overdue = r.overdueCount      || 0;
				var forecast= r.compositeForecast || 0;
				var staleHeavy = totalOp > 0 && (stale / totalOp) > 0.35;

				// PILOT CHAIN
				if (pilWt > 0 && pilTgt > 0) {
					var pilGap = pilTgt - pilCnt;
					if (pilGap > 0 && qp > 0.2) {
						var repP2pil = p2pil > 0 ? p2pil : (bm.p2pil || 50);
						var expectedClose = pilPipe * (repP2pil / 100);
						if (pilPipe > 0 && expectedClose >= pilGap) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🔒',
												 title: 'Pilot-Pipeline schließen: ' + pilCnt + '/' + pilTgt,
												 detail: pilPipe + ' Opps in Pilot-Pipeline \u2192 ' + Math.round(expectedClose * 10) / 10 + ' erwartet. Jede Opp auf n\u00e4chsten Schritt pushen \u2014 Close-Date-Review mit TL.'
												});
						} else if (bm.d2po > 0 && d2po > 0 && d2po < bm.d2po * 0.7) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🔄',
												 title: 'Demo\u2192Pilot-Opp: ' + Math.round(d2po) + '% (' + (bm.d2po < 80 ? 'Team: ' + Math.round(bm.d2po) + '%' : 'Ziel: \u226560%') + ')',
												 detail: 'Demos werden zu selten zu Pilot-Opps. Discovery im Demo: Pilot-Scope direkt adressieren. Nicht nur pr\u00e4sentieren \u2014 Fit und n\u00e4chsten Schritt kl\u00e4ren.'
												});
						} else if (bm.mtg > 0 && mtg < bm.mtg * 0.75) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '📅',
												 title: 'Meeting-Rate: ' + fmtD(mtg) + '/Tag (Team: ' + fmtD(bm.mtg) + ')',
												 detail: 'Zu wenig Meetings um Pilot-Funnel zu f\u00fcllen. Kalendertermin direkt im QualCall setzen \u2014 nicht per Mail nachfassen.'
												});
						} else if (demos < 3) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🎯',
												 title: 'Demo-Pipeline aufbauen: nur ' + demos + ' Demos Q-t-D',
												 detail: 'Pilot-Funnel beginnt beim Demo. QT-Calls auf Demo-Booking optimieren: Wert klar machen, Termin sofort im Call buchen.'
												});
						} else {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🚀',
												 title: 'Piloten: ' + pilCnt + '/' + pilTgt + ' \u2014 ' + pilPipe + ' Opps in Pipeline',
												 detail: 'Noch ' + pilGap + ' Pilot(en) ben\u00f6tigt. Pipeline: ' + pilPipe + ' Opps. Pilot-Scope in jedem Discovery-Call aktiv einbringen.'
												});
						}
					} else if (pilGap <= 0 && bm.p2pil > 0 && p2pil > bm.p2pil * 1.2) {
						tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '⭐',
											 title: 'Pilot-Excellence: ' + pilCnt + '/' + pilTgt,
											 detail: 'Ziel erreicht, Conversion ' + Math.round(p2pil) + '% vs. Team ' + Math.round(bm.p2pil) + '%. Methodik im Team-Meeting teilen.'
											});
					}
				}

				// BOOKING CHAIN
				var bkGap = Math.max(0, bkTgt - bkARR);
				if (bkGap > 0 && bkTgt > 0 && qp > 0.15) {
					var covRatio = pipe / bkGap;
					var gapK = Math.round(bkGap / 1000);
					if (isEndQ && covRatio < 1.5) {
						tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '⚡',
											 title: 'Endspurt: ' + Math.round(bkAtt) + '% \u2014 Coverage ' + fmtD(covRatio) + 'x',
											 detail: '1-2 Deals mit h\u00f6chster Close-Wahrscheinlichkeit identifizieren, 100% Fokus. Rest \u2192 Q2.'
											});
					} else if (covRatio >= 2.5) {
						if (bm.wr > 0 && wr < bm.wr * 0.75) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '📉',
												 title: 'Win Rate ' + Math.round(wr) + '% (Team: ' + Math.round(bm.wr) + '%)',
												 detail: 'Pipeline ausreichend (' + fmtD(covRatio) + 'x). Hebel ist Win Rate. In welcher Stage verlierst du? Deal-Review + die letzten 2 Lost Deals mit TL anh\u00f6ren.'
												});
						} else if (staleHeavy) {
							tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🧹',
												 title: stale + ' Stale Opps \u2014 Pipeline bereinigen',
												 detail: 'Genug Volumen, aber ' + Math.round(stale/totalOp*100) + '% stale. Bereinigen gibt realistisches Coverage-Bild. Heute ' + Math.min(stale,5) + ' Deals reaktivieren/schlie\u00dfen.'
												});
						}
					} else {
						if (bm.qtToO > 0 && qtToOpp > 0 && qtToOpp < bm.qtToO * 0.65) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🔄',
												 title: 'QT\u2192Opp: ' + Math.round(qtToOpp) + '% (Team: ' + Math.round(bm.qtToO) + '%)',
												 detail: 'Pipeline-Gap ' + gapK + 'k. QT\u2192Opp unter Team-Median. Next-Steps im QT-Call direkt committen: Pilot-Scope + Datum sofort setzen.'
												});
						} else if (bm.tToQT > 0 && tToQT > 0 && tToQT < bm.tToQT * 0.65) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🎯',
												 title: 'T\u2192QT: ' + Math.round(tToQT) + '% (Team: ' + Math.round(bm.tToQT) + '%)',
												 detail: 'Pipeline-Gap ' + gapK + 'k. Qualifizierungsrate unter Team-Median. Pitch-Review: Wird der Schmerzpunkt klar adressiert? Call-Recordings mit TL.'
												});
						} else if (bm.touch > 0 && touch < bm.touch * 0.75) {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '📞',
												 title: 'Aktivit\u00e4t: ' + fmtD(touch) + '/Tag (Team: ' + fmtD(bm.touch) + ')',
												 detail: 'Pipeline-Gap ' + gapK + 'k. Hebel: +' + Math.round(bm.touch - touch) + ' Touches/Tag. Blockierzeit im Kalender reservieren.'
												});
						} else {
							tips.push({ prio: 1, emoji: '🚨',
												 title: 'Coverage ' + fmtD(covRatio) + 'x \u2014 Ziel 2,5x',
												 detail: 'Pipeline-Gap ' + gapK + 'k ARR. T\u00e4glich mind. 1 neue Opp er\u00f6ffnen. Fokus auf QT-Calls \u2192 direktes Opp-Opening.'
												});
						}
					}
				} else if (bkGap <= 0 && bm.wr > 0 && wr > bm.wr * 1.2) {
					tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '🏆',
										 title: 'BK-Ziel erreicht + Win Rate ' + Math.round(wr) + '%',
										 detail: 'Team-Median: ' + Math.round(bm.wr) + '%. Peer-Coaching: welcher Kollege k\u00e4mpft mit Win Rate?'
										});
				}

				// SEKUNDÄRE HYGIENE
				if (stale > 3 && !tips.find(function(t){ return t.emoji === '🧹'; })) {
					tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '🧹',
										 title: stale + ' Opps ohne Follow-up (>14d)',
										 detail: 'Heute ' + Math.min(stale,5) + ' Deals reaktivieren oder schlie\u00dfen. Stale Opps verzerren Coverage + Forecast.'
										});
				}
				if (overdue > 4 && tips.length < 3) {
					tips.push({ prio: 2, emoji: '⏰',
										 title: overdue + ' \u00fcberf\u00e4llige Deals',
										 detail: 'CloseDate \u00fcberschritten. F\u00fcr jeden: Datum verschieben (+ warum), pushen oder verlieren. Keine Zombie-Deals.'
										});
				}

				// EXCELLENCE (kein Prio-1-Gap)
				if (!tips.find(function(t){ return t.prio === 1; })) {
					if (bm.touch > 0 && touch > bm.touch * 1.3 && bm.tToQT > 0 && tToQT > bm.tToQT * 1.2) {
						tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '⭐',
											 title: 'Top-Aktivit\u00e4t + Top-Qualifizierung',
											 detail: fmtD(touch) + ' Touch/Tag, T\u2192QT ' + Math.round(tToQT) + '% \u2014 beides deutlich \u00fcber Team. Methodik im Team-Meeting teilen.'
											});
					}
					if (bm.wr > 0 && wr > bm.wr * 1.3) {
						tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '🏆',
											 title: 'Beste Win Rate: ' + Math.round(wr) + '% (Team: ' + Math.round(bm.wr) + '%)',
											 detail: 'Was machst du anders in der Closing-Stage? Peer-Coaching anbieten.'
											});
					}
				}

				// END-Q URGENZ
				if (isEndQ && forecast < 80) {
					var p1 = tips.find(function(t){ return t.prio === 1; });
					if (p1) p1.detail = '\u26a1 ' + p1.detail;
				}

				tips.sort(function(a,b){ return a.prio - b.prio; });
				tips = tips.slice(0, 3);
				if (!tips.length) {
					tips.push({ prio: 0, emoji: '✅', title: 'Auf Kurs!',
										 detail: 'Alle KPIs im gr\u00fcnen Bereich. Peer-Coaching: hilf einem Kollegen mit der gr\u00f6\u00dften L\u00fccke.'
										});
				}
				return tips;
			}

			function coachingCard(r) {
				var tips = coachingTips(r);
				var h = '<div class="coaching-card"><div class="coaching-card-title">💡 Coaching-Empfehlungen</div>';
				tips.forEach(function(tip) {
					h += '<div class="coaching-tip">' +
						'<div class="coaching-tip-emoji">' + tip.emoji + '</div>' +
						'<div><div class="coaching-tip-title">' + tip.title + '</div>' +
						'<div class="coaching-tip-detail">' + tip.detail + '</div></div></div>';
				});
				h += '</div>';
				return h;
			}

			function svgSparkline(points, opts) {
				opts = opts || {};
				var W = 280, H = 130, pL = 28, pR = 14, pT = 12, pB = 24;
				var iW = W - pL - pR, iH = H - pT - pB;
				if (!points || points.length < 2) {
					return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px"><text x="' + (W/2) + '" y="' + (H/2+4) + '" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9090b0" font-size="12" font-family="system-ui">Keine Daten</text></svg>';
				}
				var vals = points.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; });
				var maxV = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max.apply(null, vals.concat([0.01]));
				function xp(i) { return pL + (points.length > 1 ? (i / (points.length - 1)) * iW : iW / 2); }
				function yp(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV || 1)) * iH; }
				var path = points.map(function(p, i) { return (i === 0 ? 'M' : 'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp(p.value || 0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
				var fill = path + ' L' + xp(points.length-1).toFixed(1) + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' L' + pL + ',' + (pT+iH) + ' Z';
				var gid = 'g' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 5);
				var c = opts.color || '#0078d4';
				var pl = iW * 1.6;
				var refHtml = '';
				if (opts.refValue != null) {
					var ry = yp(Math.min(opts.refValue, maxV * 1.05)).toFixed(1);
					refHtml = '<line x1="' + pL + '" y1="' + ry + '" x2="' + (pL+iW) + '" y2="' + ry + '" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3" opacity="0.6"/><text x="' + (pL+iW+2) + '" y="' + (Number(ry)+4) + '" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">BM</text>';
				}
				var line2Html = '';
				if (opts.line2 && opts.line2.length >= 2) {
					var p2 = opts.line2;
					var maxV2 = opts.yMax != null ? opts.yMax : Math.max(maxV, Math.max.apply(null, p2.map(function(p) { return p.value || 0; })));
					function yp2(v) { return pT + iH - (v / (maxV2 || 1)) * iH; }
					var path2 = p2.map(function(p, i) { return (i===0?'M':'L') + xp(i).toFixed(1) + ',' + yp2(p.value||0).toFixed(1); }).join(' ');
					line2Html = '<path d="' + path2 + '" fill="none" stroke="#9090b0" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="5,3" opacity="0.7"/>';
				}
				var xLabels = '';
				points.forEach(function(p, i) {
					if (i === 0 || i === points.length-1 || points.length <= 6) {
						xLabels += '<text x="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" y="' + (H-5) + '" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0" font-family="system-ui">' + (p.label||'') + '</text>';
					}
				});
				var dots = points.map(function(p, i) {
					return '<circle cx="' + xp(i).toFixed(1) + '" cy="' + yp(p.value||0).toFixed(1) + '" r="3" fill="' + c + '" opacity="0.9"><title>' + (p.label||'') + ': ' + (p.value||0) + '</title></circle>';
				}).join('');
				return '<svg viewBox="0 0 ' + W + ' ' + H + '" style="width:100%;height:' + H + 'px" font-family="system-ui">' +
					'<defs><linearGradient id="' + gid + '" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">' +
					'<stop offset="0%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.2"/>' +
					'<stop offset="100%" stop-color="' + c + '" stop-opacity="0.01"/>' +
					'</linearGradient></defs>' +
					'<path d="' + fill + '" fill="url(#' + gid + ')"/>' +
					refHtml + line2Html +
					'<path d="' + path + '" fill="none" stroke="' + c + '" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-dasharray="' + pl + '" stroke-dashoffset="' + pl + '" style="animation:sparkDraw 0.8s ease forwards"/>' +
					'<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+5) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">' + Math.round(maxV) + '</text>' +
					'<text x="' + (pL-2) + '" y="' + (pT+iH) + '" text-anchor="end" font-size="9" fill="#9090b0">0</text>' +
					xLabels + dots + '</svg>';
			}

			function openSparkPopup(evt, repId, metric) {
				var popup = document.getElementById('spark-popup');
				if (!popup) return;
				var wd = (_weeklyData && _weeklyData[repId]) || {};
				var actData = wd.activity || [];
				var bookData = wd.bookings || [];
				var wlData = wd.winLoss || [];
				var titles = {
					touch:'Touch/Woche', calls:'Calls/Woche', mails:'Mails/Woche', oppPerDay:'Opps/Woche (L30)',
					qt:'QualTouch/Woche', qc:'QualCalls/Woche', mtg:'Meetings/Woche',
					tToQt:'Touch→QT % (Wochen)', qtToO:'QT→Opp % (Wochen)',
					pilots:'Piloten (kumulativ)', bookings:'Bookings ARR (kumulativ)', wr:'Win Rate % (Wochen)'
				};
				var colors = {
					touch:'#0078d4', calls:'#0078d4', mails:'#60a5fa', oppPerDay:'#f59e0b',
					qt:'#10b981', qc:'#10b981', mtg:'#34d399',
					tToQt:'#f59e0b', qtToO:'#f59e0b',
					pilots:'#8b5cf6', bookings:'#059669', wr:'#dc2626'
				};
				var points = [], opts = { color: colors[metric] || '#0078d4' };
				if (metric === 'touch') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.touch }; });
				} else if (metric === 'calls') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.dials }; });
				} else if (metric === 'mails') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.emails }; });
				} else if (metric === 'qt') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.qual }; });
				} else if (metric === 'qc') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.qualCalls }; });
				} else if (metric === 'mtg') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.meetings }; });
				} else if (metric === 'tToQt') {
					points = actData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.touch > 0 ? Math.round(w.qual / w.touch * 100) : 0 }; });
				} else if (metric === 'bookings') {
					points = bookData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.cumArr }; });
					var rr = _allReps.find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; }) || {};
					if ((rr.bookingsTarget || 0) > 0 && bookData.length > 0) {
						var tgt = rr.bookingsTarget;
						opts.line2 = bookData.map(function(w, ii) { return { label: w.week, value: Math.round(tgt * (ii+1) / bookData.length) }; });
					}
				} else if (metric === 'pilots') {
					points = bookData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.cumPilots }; });
					var rr2 = _allReps.find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; }) || {};
					if ((rr2.pilotenTarget || 0) > 0 && bookData.length > 0) {
						var ptgt = rr2.pilotenTarget;
						opts.line2 = bookData.map(function(w, ii) { return { label: w.week, value: Math.round(ptgt * (ii+1) / bookData.length) }; });
					}
				} else if (metric === 'oppPerDay') {
					var od = wd.opps || [];
					points = od.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.opps }; });
				} else if (metric === 'wr') {
					points = wlData.map(function(w) { return { label: w.week, value: w.wr }; });
					opts.refValue = 30;
					opts.yMax = 100;
				}
				popup.querySelector('.spark-title').textContent = (titles[metric] || metric);
				popup.querySelector('.spark-chart').innerHTML = svgSparkline(points, opts);
				var el = evt.target.closest ? evt.target.closest('td') : evt.target;
				var rect = el.getBoundingClientRect();
				var pW = 340, left = Math.min(rect.left, window.innerWidth - pW - 10), top = rect.bottom + 6;
				if (top + 165 > window.innerHeight) top = rect.top - 170;
				popup.style.left = left + 'px';
				popup.style.top  = top  + 'px';
				// Trigger drilldown list update
				var _DRILL_MAP = { touch:'touch', calls:'calls', mails:'mails', qt:'qt', qc:'qc', mtg:'mtg',
													tToQt:'touch', bookings:'bookings', pilots:'pilots', wr:null, qtToO:null };
				var _METRIC_TITLES = { touch:'Touch/Tag (L30)', calls:'Calls/Tag (L30)', mails:'Mails/Tag (L30)',
															qt:'QualTouch/Tag (L30)', qc:'QualCalls/Tag (L30)', mtg:'Meetings/Tag (L30)',
															bookings:'Bookings QTD', pilots:'Offene Piloten' };
				var drillMetric = _DRILL_MAP.hasOwnProperty(metric) ? _DRILL_MAP[metric] : undefined;
				if (drillMetric !== undefined) {
					var repData = (_allReps || []).find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; }) || {};
					if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
						appsmith.updateModel({ __pendingDrilldown: {
							metric: drillMetric,
							repId: repId,
							repName: repData.repName || repData.name || repId,
							title: _METRIC_TITLES[drillMetric] || drillMetric,
						}});
						appsmith.triggerEvent('onDrilldown');
					}
				}
				// Trigger drilldown list update
				var _DRILL_MAP = { touch:'touch', calls:'calls', mails:'mails', qt:'qt', qc:'qc', mtg:'mtg',
													tToQt:'touch', bookings:'bookings', pilots:'pilots', wr:null, qtToO:null };
				var _METRIC_TITLES = { touch:'Touch/Tag (L30)', calls:'Calls/Tag (L30)', mails:'Mails/Tag (L30)',
															qt:'QualTouch/Tag (L30)', qc:'QualCalls/Tag (L30)', mtg:'Meetings/Tag (L30)',
															bookings:'Bookings QTD', pilots:'Offene Piloten' };
				var drillMetric = _DRILL_MAP.hasOwnProperty(metric) ? _DRILL_MAP[metric] : undefined;
				if (drillMetric !== undefined) {
					var repData = (_allReps || []).find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; }) || {};
					if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
						appsmith.updateModel({ __pendingDrilldown: {
							metric: drillMetric,
							repId: repId,
							repName: repData.repName || repData.name || repId,
							title: _METRIC_TITLES[drillMetric] || drillMetric,
						}});
						appsmith.triggerEvent('onDrilldown');
					}
				}
				popup.classList.add('open');
				setTimeout(function() { document.addEventListener('click', _closeSparkOut, { once: true }); }, 20);
			}

			function _closeSparkOut(e) {
				var p = document.getElementById('spark-popup');
				if (p && !p.contains(e.target)) p.classList.remove('open');
			}

			function closeSparkPopup() {
				var p = document.getElementById('spark-popup');
				if (p) p.classList.remove('open');
			}

			var _DRILLDOWN_TITLES = {
				bookings:'Bookings QTD', pipeline:'Open Pipeline', stale:'Stale Pipeline',
				overdue:'Überfällige Opps', won:'Gewonnene Deals', lost:'Verlorene Deals',
				pilots:'Offene Piloten', selfservice:'Self-Service QTD',
				touch:'Touch/Tag', calls:'Calls/Tag', mails:'Mails/Tag',
				qt:'QualTouch/Tag', qc:'QualCalls/Tag', mtg:'Meetings/Tag',
			};
			function openDrilldown(repId, metric) {
				var repData = (_allReps || []).find(function(x) { return x.id === repId; }) || {};
				if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
					appsmith.updateModel({ __pendingDrilldown: {
						metric: metric,
						repId: repId,
						repName: repData.repName || repData.name || repId,
						title: _DRILLDOWN_TITLES[metric] || metric,
					}});
					appsmith.triggerEvent('onDrilldown');
				}
			}

			function render(model) {
				populateQuarterDropdown(model);
				var reps = model.reps || [];
				var _hasData = reps.length > 0 && reps.some(function(r){ return (r.bookingsARR||0)+(r.dials||0) > 0; });
				var _ov = document.getElementById('loadingOverlay');
				if (_ov) { if (_hasData) _ov.classList.add('hidden'); else _ov.classList.remove('hidden'); }
				_weeksElapsed = Math.max(1, model.weeksElapsed || 1);
				_allReps = reps;
				_staleList = model.staleList || [];
				_wk = model.wk || {};
				_weeklyData = model.weeklyData || {};
				renderTable();
				setTimeout(animateBars, 50);
			}

			function extract(m) {
				if (!m) return { reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [], weeklyData: {} };
				return {
					reps:         Array.isArray(m) ? m : (m.reps || []),
					weeksElapsed: m.weeksElapsed || 1,
					quarterOptions:  m.quarterOptions || [],
					selectedQuarter: m.selectedQuarter || '',
					quarterLabel:    m.quarterLabel || '',
					staleList:    m.staleList || [],
					wk:           m.wk || {},
					weeklyData:   m.weeklyData || {},
				};
			}

			function modelKey(m) {
				return (m && m.reps || []).reduce(function(s,r){ return s+(r.bookingsARR||0)+(r.dials||0); }, 0);
			}

			// ── Progress Bar Helpers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
			function scHex(v) { return v>=80?'#58cc02':v>=60?'#ff9600':'#ff4b4b'; }
			function animateBars() {
				document.querySelectorAll('[data-bar]').forEach(function(el) {
					el.style.width = el.getAttribute('data-bar');
				});
			}
			var _fcOpen = false;
			function toggleForecast() {
				_fcOpen = !_fcOpen;
				document.querySelectorAll('.fc-col').forEach(function(el) {
					el.style.display = _fcOpen ? 'table-cell' : 'none';
				});
				var btn = document.getElementById('fc-toggle');
				if (btn) btn.textContent = _fcOpen ? '－' : '＋';
			}
			(function() {
				if (!document.getElementById('fc-style')) {
					var s = document.createElement('style');
					s.id = 'fc-style';
					s.textContent = '.fc-col{display:none}';
					document.head.appendChild(s);
				}
			})();

			var _lastKey = null;
			function poll() {
				if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined' && appsmith.model) {
					var key = modelKey(appsmith.model);
					if (key !== _lastKey) { _lastKey = key; render(extract(appsmith.model)); }
				}
				setTimeout(poll, 300);
			}

			if (typeof appsmith !== 'undefined') {
				appsmith.onReady(function() { render(extract(appsmith.model)); poll(); });
				appsmith.onModelChange(function(m) { render(extract(m)); });
			} else {
				render({ reps: [], weeksElapsed: 1, staleList: [] });
			}
		</script>
	</body>
</html>
